title: Ability to show board notifications in taskbar
excerpt:

posts.author: weston (Weston)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some of our boards are linked to forms (external sponsorship requests, internal creative requests, etc.). Form submissions are sent to a queue group then progress through their respective workflows.

We get a standard notification when a new item comes into queue. However as we expand monday’s use across the business, those notifications will be quickly buried. The quick solution is just checking these boards daily, but it would be great to display a count similar to the messages icon on your iPhone. Even better if you could decide what count is displayed.

In my case, I would say "display count of items in group ‘in queue’ ". This would be great for the speed/efficiency of our team, but I can see it being a niche need.

This may be a niche case
